ai_summary: Here's an executive summary of the document:  AVG Logistics Limited reported a robust Q4 FY26, demonstrating significant year-on-year growth in revenue (19.4%), EBITDA (45.21%), and PAT (104.78%), reflecting strong operational efficiency and margin expansion. The company is strategically expanding into high-growth areas like rail-based liquid logistics and sustainable transport (EV, CNG, LNG), while planning annual capex of INR50-60 crores to support projected double-digit revenue growth for FY27 and an ambitious INR1250 crore turnover by 2030. No immediate red flags are evident, as management has mitigation strategies for challenges like rising fuel costs through contractual clauses and is investing in EV infrastructure.
